To use these commands, you need to use the run command in Microsoft Windows XP. To do this, go to the Start Menu and go to Run. You can also get to the Run command in Microsoft Windows XP by pressing the Windows Logo Key and the letter R on the keyboard!


Command: Function:
access.cpl Accessibility Options
appwiz.cpl Shell Application Manager (Add / Remove Programs)
desk.cpl Desktop Control Panel
hdwwiz.cpl Add Hardware Control Panel Applet
intl.cpl Regional Settings
main.cpl Mouse, Keyboard, etc.
nusrmgr.cpl Windows User Manager
powercfg.cpl Power Management Configuration Control Panel Applet
sysdm.cpl System Applet for the Control Panel
timedate.cpl Time / Date Control Panel Applet
inetcpl.cpl Internet Control Panel
mmsys.cpl Audio and Sound Control Panel
